work.title: Python & AI Intern
work.label: Odisha Knowledge Corporation Limited, Bhubaneswar
work.description:
Worked on a real-time project titled "News Scraper using Python Programming (Youth Times)", focused on extracting news articles from live websites using web scraping techniques.
• Built a custom scraper using Python and BeautifulSoup
• Parsed and organized structured data from news sources
• Applied backend logic for automation and data processing
• Strengthened debugging, data handling, and script optimization skills
This internship offered valuable hands-on experience in backend scripting and working with real-world data pipelines.
